source: iOS KvtxScriptUtilsTests; Android currently throws for the same malformed script

expected.commonDecision: KMP common KVTX parsing should fail malformed WRITE_BYTES payloads with a typed malformed-script parse error. iOS nil-on-truncation compatibility should remain in an adapter only if required.

notes: iOS currently returns nil when WRITE_BYTES declares a three-byte payload but only one byte remains.
